import subprocess
r = subprocess.run(['pgrep', '-a', 'miner'], capture_output=True, text=True)
procs = r.stdout.strip() if r.stdout else 'None'

r2 = subprocess.run(['ps', 'aux'], capture_output=True, text=True)
lines = [l for l in r2.stdout.split(chr(10)) if 'alpha' in l.lower() or 'miner' in l.lower() or 'pool' in l.lower()]

result = f'Miner procs: {procs}' + chr(10) + chr(10).join(lines[:5])
